creator: Net147@hotmail.com
text:
normalize-mp3 and normalize-ogg don't seem to work properly.

This has been fixed in the latest version of normalize (0.7.7) but the fix
wasn't reflected in the FreeBSD port of normalize.

The attached patch updates normalize-mp3 to the latest version (and
normalize-ogg as well as it is just a symbolic link to normalize-mp3)
which fixes the problem.

How-To-Repeat: Use normalize-mp3 to normalize an mp3 or normalize-ogg to normalize an ogg file.
